title: The No-Nonsense Guide to How to Sell Ebooks from Kenya — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a Kenyan ebook creator stuck with a PayPal account that's been locked down due to 'high-risk activity'. You've tried every other payment platform, but they all require a bank account or KYC verification. You're about to give up on selling your ebooks online, but there's hope. A blockchain-based payment solution can help you reach a global audience without the need for traditional payment processors or bank accounts. In this post, we'll show you how to sell ebooks from Kenya, without relying on PayPal or any other restricted payment method.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The beauty of blockchain-based payments lies in their ability to bypass traditional payment restrictions. By using a cryptocurrency-based payment processor like NOWPayments, you can accept payments from anywhere in the world, without worrying about the complexities of international transactions or the need for a bank account. This method is not only reliable but also secure, as all transactions are recorded on a public ledger, making it virtually impossible to manipulate or cheat.
What You Need Before You Start

To get started, you'll need a digital product to sell – in this case, an ebook – and a payment processor like NOWPayments. You'll also need to set up an account on our Core Engine, which is a crucial part of our payment and delivery pipeline. Additionally, you'll need to download our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration to make it easy for your customers to make payments. Finally, you'll need to familiarize yourself with our Admin Dashboard, which provides real-time analytics and transaction logs.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

With our Full Stack Bundle, setting up your payment and delivery pipeline is a breeze. Our Core Engine handles automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, while our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration makes it easy for customers to make payments. Our Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, so you can keep track of your sales and customer activity. By integrating these components, you'll have a seamless payment and delivery pipeline that's ready to handle international transactions.
Blockchain-based payments bypass traditional payment restrictions and enable global access to digital products.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and make your first sale. Start by promoting your ebook on social media and other online platforms. As customers begin to make purchases, our system will automatically deliver the ebook and generate a PDF receipt. Our Admin Dashboard will also keep track of your sales and customer activity, so you can see exactly who's buying your ebook and from where.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

With our Full Stack Bundle, scaling your ebook business is a breeze. Our payment and delivery pipeline is designed to handle large volumes of transactions, so you can focus on creating more ebooks and promoting your business to a wider audience. Our Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, so you can keep track of your sales and customer activity, and make data-driven decisions to optimize your business.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most practical path for creators in restricted countries is a combination of NOWPayments for payment processing and USDT on Tron for the primary payment coin. USDT is a stable coin pegged to the US dollar, which means your revenue does not fluctuate with crypto market movements. Tron network fees are under one dollar, and settlement takes under 60 seconds. Once you receive USDT in your wallet, you convert to local currency through P2P exchanges — Binance P2P, Paxful, or local platforms specific to your country. The conversion typically takes 20-30 minutes and costs 2-5% of the transaction, which is significantly less than PayPal's international transfer fees or Western Union's rates. This is the complete payment flow that thousands of creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are using right now.
Our Full Stack Bundle provides everything you need to set up a digital product store and start selling internationally.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, you'll love our Full Stack Bundle, which provides everything you need to set up a digital product store and start selling internationally. Check out our Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling ebooks from Kenya without PayPal, follow these steps: Download our Core Engine and set up an account; Set up an account with NOWPayments; Integrate our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration with your ebook store; Promote your ebook on social media and other online platforms; Set up our Admin Dashboard to track your sales and customer activity; Go live and make your first sale!
With our solution, you can sell ebooks online without worrying about PayPal's limitations or the need for a bank account.
